description: A kind of academic work a faculty member can be wired to perform in an Academic Unit (advising, verification, examining, etc.). The routes_to machine key lets routing code filter by meaning, not by the editable display name. Add the capabilities your school uses.

fields.description: Stable machine key the routing code filters on (so the display name above can be edited freely). Picks which subsystem this capability feeds.
fields.label: Routes To
fields.options:
Course Instructor
Thesis/CP Advisor
Internship Advisor
Placement Examiner
Manual-Verification Verifier
Mentor
Committee/Board Member

fields.description: When checked, holders declare a capacity (Max Students) for this capability — used for capacity-aware assignment (advising, examining, verifying). Leave off for capabilities without a cap, like Course Instructor or Board/Committee Member.
fields.label: Tracks Capacity

fields.description: Uncheck to retire this capability without deleting it (keeps history on existing memberships).
fields.label: Is Active

name: Faculty Capability
